policy: Expanded snippets do not promote candidates. They only strengthen display and audit of rows already in authoritative_scope_rows.

records.acceptance_tier_en: A1 structured company-level absolute value; directly usable
records.acceptance_tier_zh: A1 公司级结构化绝对量，可直接使用
records.recognition_basis_en: Expanded from source page text for direct-use Scope evidence.
records.recognition_basis_zh: Expanded from source page text for direct-use Scope evidence.
records.snippet_en: Sustainability report Environmental information > FOR AUCHAN RETAIL The calculation of baseline values is currently being updated to take account of changes in scope and methodology (see section 3.2.2.7). Progress towards this objective will be monitored at the end of the project. > FOR NEW IMMO HOLDING Target Response to the RFP Scope 1 2022: 19,578 ktCO2e Scope 2 - Location-based 2022: 59,610 ktCO2e Scope 2 - Market-based 2022: 12,030 ktCO2e Data for the reporting year have been recalculated to take account of changes in the scope of consolidation. 3.2.2.5.5 If GHG emission reduction targets are based on scientific data and are compatible with limiting global warming to +1.5°C E1.34.E.1 - B > TARGETS DEFINED BY AUCHAN RETAIL Target Response to the DP Reducing scopes 1 and 2 GHG emissions: Yes Reduction in GHG emissions relating to purchases of goods and services, freight and upstream distribution, and the use and end- of-life of products sold (scope 3). Yes > TARGETS DEFINED BY NEW IMMO HOLDING: Target Response to the DP Scope 1 Not disclosed Scope 2 - Location-based Not disclosed Scope 2 - Market-based Not disclosed 3.2.2.5.6 EXPECTED DECARBONI
